data.css:
<style>.mr2p{margin-left:70px} .mr3p{margin-right:70px}
	h4 {
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: row;
	width: 100%;
	color: black;
}

h4:before,
h4:after {
	content: '';
	flex: 1 1;
	border-bottom: 1px solid #cfcdcd;
	margin: auto 15px;
}

.flex {
	display: flex
}

.relative {
	position: relative;
}

.cardHeader{
	  min-width: 230px;  position: absolute;
    bottom: 28%;
    -webkit-transform: translateX(-50%);
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    color: #000;
    left: 50%;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 0px;
    margin-bottom: 0px;
}

.mt35 {
	margin-top: 35px
}

.mt70 {
	margin-top: 80px
}

.w80 {
	width: 80%
}

.pt15 {
	padding-top: 15px;
}

.pb15 {
	padding-bottom: 15px;
}

.pl15 {
	padding-left: 15px;
}

.pr15 {
	padding-right: 15px;
}

.font-head {
	font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans-Medium';
	letter-spacing: 0.5px;
	font-size: 30px;
}

.w92 {
	width: 92%
}

.w50 {
	width: 50%
}

.pl7 {
	padding-left: 7.5px
}

.pr7 {
	padding-right: 7.5px
}

.w100 {
	width: 100%
}

.catSlider_btn {
	display: none
}

.catSlider {
	border: 0
}

.bottom-b {
	border-bottom: 1px solid #cfcdcd;
}

.catSlider {
	width: 100%;
	margin-left: 5%
}

.justcenter,
.our-brands-sect {
	justify-content: center
}

.dropdown {
	width: 16%
}

.home {
	width: 100%;
	max-width: 1920px;
	margin: 0 auto;
}

.mrt2p {
	margin-top: 2%
}

.mb70 {
	margin-bottom: 70px
}

.shop_spl_btn {margin-top: 20px;    display: flex;    -webkit-box-pack: center;    justify-content: space-evenly;}.shop_spl_btn a {    outline: none;    font-size: 20px;    display: flex;    -webkit-box-pack: center;    justify-content: center;    -webkit-box-align: center;    align-items: center;    border-radius: 10px;    border: 1.25px solid transparent;    padding: 10px 50px;    color: var(--white);    cursor: pointer;    background-color: var(--primary-primary-main);    width: max-content;    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;}</style>

data.html:
Sunglasses

Men
Women
Shop Sunglasses

data.css: <style>.section-component{margin-left: 35px; margin-right: 35px}.odtips-cards{display:flex;gap:35px}.odtips-cards-item{position:relative;display:block;flex:1;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;text-decoration:none;color:#fff}.odtips-cards-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}.odtips-cards-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:1;border-radius:8px}.odtips-cards-item-label{position: absolute;font-size: 18px;font-weight: 600;z-index: 2;top: 50%;left: 50%;transform: translate(-50%, -50%)}.shop_tip_btn {margin-top: 20px;    display: flex;    -webkit-box-pack: center;    justify-content: center;}.shop_tip_btn a {    outline: none;    font-size: 16px;    display: flex;    -webkit-box-pack: center;    justify-content: center;    -webkit-box-align: center;    align-items: center;    border-radius: 10px;    border: 1.25px solid transparent;    padding: 10px 50px;    color: var(--white);    cursor: pointer;    background-color: var(--primary-primary-main);    width: max-content;    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;}</style>
